warnings: Changes to the checkout flow that may have impact on other customers or cause any backwards compatibility problems.  For example changes to the core features in the mini cart, sales tax and delivery calculations would require deep technical scrutiny before customisations would be considered.
Core platform changes to logic for pricing, taxes, delivery and charges that affect all customers are not advised as change requests unless they can be isolated at the periphery for 1 customer.
oks: Verification of WebShop after an ERP Upgrade.  This is generally a paid testing and verification exercise (circa 1 day + separate costs for any issues arising) that is welcomed to ensure we retain customers.  this is especially low risk for minor upgrades of ERPs e.g. upgrade from SAP v9.3 to SAP v10.0 or from Intact v-line  to x-line and from Intact iQ services upgrade from SOAP to REST.  Larger gaps in upgrades e.g. from Intact V-line/x-line to iQ incur more risk and may require more paid discovery and verification as there may be changes to business rules, field mapping and other areas.

Template/design upgrades to Forta for customers.  It is OK for customers to move to the Forta design system and refresh their design.  This change will unlock important features like Visual Editor (previously "VPB")
